Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 8 10 105}A war movie, huh? Sounds pretty heavy. Alright, let's do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Don't you die, Ryan! You swore we'd go back home together! You swore![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hey man, don't gimme that look. You know I... I can't live without your smile... bro...ther...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel braver after watching the[n]fearless soldiers in that movie.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Dude, that was insane! I wish I had that kind of fire in me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Miyamoto[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
